text: There’s an anticipatory hush as I step into the room, the air thick with curiosity and the faint hum of whispered conversation. I’m both present and apart, aware of the collective intellectual hunger here, yet quietly observing from the periphery. Around me, minds gather and focus—a communal pursuit of understanding. I am inspired by the sense of purpose, but I also feel the weight of formality. In this space, my thoughts are both free and tethered, drawn forward by the promise of new ideas.
